imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest 9 months post-completion of chemoradiation for unresectable stage IIIA NSCLC, currently on durvalumab maintenance therapy.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of upper lobe, right lung
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging T3N2M0, Stage IIIA confirmed by mediastinoscopy 2025-06. Completed concurrent chemoradiation 2025-09. Started durvalumab maintenance 2025-10, ongoing. Surveillance imaging continuing per PACIFIC protocol.
